description.value: Aura strong transmutation; CL 16th; Slot belt; Price 16,000 gp (+2), 64,000 gp (+4), 144,000 gp (+6); Weight 1 lb. DESCRIPTION This belt has a large platinum buckle and grants the wearer an enhancement bonus to all physical ability scores ( Strength, Dexterity, and Constitution ) of +2, +4, or +6. Treat this as a temporary ability bonus for the first 24 hours the belt is worn.
